findings.title: Diretorio de cert HTTPS local (.kalibrium/https-dev-cert/) deve estar explicitamente em .gitignore
findings.evidence: scripts/pwa/serve-https.mjs:73 persiste cert/key em .kalibrium/https-dev-cert/; plan.md se65:294 cita adicao de certs/ ao .gitignore mas o caminho real e .kalibrium/. Risco: cert self-signed e key RSA2048 dev-only poderiam ser acidentalmente commitados.
findings.recommendation: Adicionar linha '.kalibrium/' ao .gitignore (follow-up, nao bloqueia merge pois cert e dev-only e nao cobre dominio real). Verificar em proxima sessao.

lgpd_checks.audit_trail_present: n/a (no data mutation in this slice)

sw_security.https_only_enforced: via import.meta.env.PROD gate + browser spec (SW only activates on HTTPS/localhost)

evidence.tenant_isolation: verified (SW denies all /api/* caching at 3 layers: navigateFallbackDenylist + pathname.startsWith guard in both NavigationRoute and asset route + static grep of dist/sw.js returns zero literal /api)
evidence.https_dev_helper: scripts/pwa/serve-https.mjs is dev/test-only; generates self-signed cert under .kalibrium/https-dev-cert; never runs in production build; fallback to OpenSSL when env cert not provided

threat_model_coverage.cache_poisoning: mitigated via CacheFirst only on hashed Vite assets + cleanupOutdatedCaches on upgrade
threat_model_coverage.stale_credential_reuse: n/a (no auth data cached by this slice; AC-007 guarantees /api/* never cached)
threat_model_coverage.manifest_spoofing: manifest served same-origin, no external icon URLs
